Table 1: Performance comparisons of reward methods on ReasonEdit-Reward-113K from perspectives of logicality, accuracy, and usefulness. SRCC (ρs), KRCC (ρk), and PLCC (ρp) metrics are reported. ♠ Vision-language metrics, ♣ small-scale MLLMs, ★ middle-scale MLLMs, ✩ closed-source MLLMs. The best results are highlighted in bold, and the second-best results are underlined.
Table 10: Implementation details of ReasonEdit GRPO
Figure 1: Dataflow during the construction of ResonEdit-22K and its two subsets

Table 3: Out-of-distribution test on other public image editing benchmarks. The best results are highlighted in bold, and the second-best results are underlined. “-” indicates that the model was trained on this dataset, and thus its result is not reported to ensure a fair cross-dataset evaluation.

Table 2: Performance comparisons of quality evaluation methods on EBench-18K from perspectives of visual quality, editing alignment, and content preservation. SRCC (ρs), KRCC-τb (ρk), and PLCC (ρp) metrics are reported. ♠ Traditional FR IQA metrics, ♡ traditional NR IQA metrics, ♣ deep learning-based FR IQA methods, ♢ deep learning-based NR IQA methods, ★ vision-language metrics, ✩ MLLM-based models. The best results are highlighted in bold, and the second-best results are underlined.
